title: SDF Sculptor — Raymarched Scene Builder
description: Sculpt 3D scenes from blended signed-distance shapes, light them, and export a render, JSON, or a share link.
concept: A single-fragment-shader raymarcher lets you stack spheres, boxes, tori, and capsules that melt into each other with a smoothness slider. Switch between Sculpt (shape editing), Light (camera + material presets), and Gallery (built-in scenes, save/export) modes to build and share your own sculptures.
features: Up to 8 SDF primitives (sphere/box/torus/capsule) with per-shape position, size, color and smooth-blend sliders
Orbit camera with drag/pinch, distance zoom, and auto-rotate
Lighting rig with azimuth/elevation/ambient sliders plus Matte/Plastic/Metal/Glow material presets, soft shadows and AO
4 built-in presets (Blob Trio, Snowman, Molecule, Torus Chain) plus a localStorage 'My Scenes' gallery with thumbnails
Export PNG render, export/import scene JSON, and shareable URL-hash links

interaction.mouse: Drag on canvas to orbit, scroll wheel to zoom
interaction.click: Select shapes, switch modes, load presets/saved scenes
interaction.touch: Drag to orbit, pinch to zoom, tap the gear button to open the control sheet
interaction.keyboard: Not required — all controls are pointer-driven sliders and buttons
